failure: Global modals or toast in public/index.html are parsed outside #app, causing hidden dialogs to display and Vue template expressions such as {{ toast.message }} to appear as raw text.
evidence: 2026-06-04 field configuration modal edit broke the teleport/div/details closure hierarchy; browser DOM showed showCtripCookieEditorModal, showDataConfigModal, and showOnlineDataEditModal as body-level static nodes.
expected: All global modals, teleports, and toast containers remain inside the Vue #app boundary before runtime mounting; after load, no visible raw {{ }} template expressions should appear.
guard: Run npm run verify:public-entry after large public/index.html template edits; the guard checks key global UI markers remain inside #app.
